Intercontinental Exchange raises quarterly dividend by 7% to $0.48; annual dividend for 2025 expected to be $1.92 per share.
news.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE), a global technology and data provider, recently approved a first quarter 2025 dividend of $0.48 per share, marking a 7% increase from the previous $0.45 per share dividend in 2024. This cash dividend will be paid on March 31, 2025, to stockholders who are recorded as such by March 17, 2025. The ex-dividend date is also March 17, 2025. ICE anticipates the total dividend for 2025 to be $1.92 per share.

Canada Goose reports fiscal Q3 2025 results ending Dec 29, 2024. CEO highlights business acceleration in December.
news.summary: Canada Goose Holdings Inc. released its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal 2025, concluding on December 29, 2024. The company trades on both the NYSE and TSX under the symbol GOOS. All figures mentioned are in Canadian dollars. CEO Dani Reiss noted the successful execution during a crucial consumer shopping period, notably in December where substantial business growth was observed. The brand experienced strong momentum during this time.

news.headline: Hershey stock drops as rising commodity prices impact profits.
Kenvue Inc. (NYSE: KVUE) reports 2024 financial results with profit despite slower sales growth.CEO confident about 2025 plans.
news.summary: Skillman, NJ - Kenvue Inc. (NYSE: KVUE) released its financial results for the fiscal fourth quarter and full year ending on December 29, 2024. Despite facing challenges that led to lower sales growth than anticipated, the company met its profit targets for 2024. CEO Thibaut Mongon stated that they are now in a stronger position to compete in 2025 due to enhanced brand investments. The company is concentrating on utilizing these investments to drive growth and achieve long-term success.

news.headline: AMC to announce Q4 and full year 2024 results on Feb 25 after market close. Webcast available. #AMC #earnings #NYSE
news.summary: AMC Entertainment Holdings, Inc. will release its financial results for Q4 and the full year ending December 31, 2024, after the market closes on February 25, 2025. As the world's largest theatrical exhibition company, AMC (NYSE: AMC) will conduct an earnings webcast available on their Investor Relations website at investor.amctheatres.com/. The announcement signifies a key milestone for the company, providing stakeholders with crucial insights into its performance during this period.

news.headline: Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE: TPR) reports strong Q2 results, ending on Dec 28, 2024. CEO credits teams for outperformance.
news.summary: In New York, Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE: TPR), known for Coach, Kate Spade, and Stuart Weitzman brands, announced its fiscal Q2 results till December 28, 2024. CEO Joanne Crevoiserat credited the remarkable performance to dedicated teams and brand development efforts, stating a significant success during the crucial holiday period.

news.headline: US Foods to present at CAGNY 2025 Conference on Feb. 20, at 11am EST. Webcast live at ir.usfoods.com.
news.summary: US Foods Holding Corp. shared that CEO Dave Flitman and CFO Dirk Locascio are scheduled to speak at the CAGNY 2025 Conference on February 20, 2025, at 11 a.m. EST. The presentation, viewable at https://ir.usfoods.com, will be live webcasted with an archived replay available post-event. US Foods aims to assist its customers with their foodservice needs. This information comes from a Rosemont-based company, traded on the NYSE under USFD.

news.headline: Yum! Brands, Inc. raises quarterly dividend by 6% to $0.71 per share.
news.summary: In the city of Louisville, Kentucky, Yum! Brands, Inc. has disclosed a 6% rise in their quarterly dividend to $0.71 per share.

news.headline: Philip Morris International reports strong 2024 results driven by IQOS and ZYN; US FDA authorizes ZYN nicotine pouches.
news.summary: In Stamford, CT, Philip Morris International Inc. (NYSE: PM) released its 2024 fourth-quarter and full-year results. CEO Jacek Olczak expressed satisfaction with the company's performance, citing significant growth due to IQOS and ZYN, along with a solid showing in combustibles. Notably, all ZYN nicotine pouches currently available in the U.S. have received FDA approval, marking a key milestone for the company. PMI's strong results in 2024 reflect its successful strategy, with a focus on innovation and diversified product offerings.

news.headline: Align Partners submitted 4 shareholder proposals at Coway Co., Ltd. in South Korea to protect minority shareholders' interests.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, Align Partners Capital Management Inc. has been a shareholder of Coway Co., Ltd. since 2023. On February 6, 2025, they submitted 4 shareholder proposals for the upcoming Annual General Meeting. These proposals focus on promoting governance that benefits all stakeholders, not just the biggest shareholder. Align Partners aims to appoint Namuh Rhee, an independent expert in governance and capital markets, to support these proposals.

news.headline: Yum! Brands reported Q4 EPS of $1.49, $1.61 excluding Special Items, FY GAAP EPS of $5.22, $5.48 excluding Special Items.
news.summary: Yum! Brands, Inc. released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter, the company reported a GAAP EPS of $1.49, while EPS excluding Special Items stood at $1.61. For the full year, the GAAP EPS was $5.22, with EPS excluding Special Items at $5.48, showing a 6% increase. CEO David Gibbs expressed satisfaction with the significant core operating profit growth achieved in 2024 despite challenges in the consumer landscape. The company remains optimistic about its performance based on these results.

news.headline: 7 For All Mankind launches global campaign for Spring Summer ‘25 promoting self-expression and cultural connectivity.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, premium denim brand 7 For All Mankind has unveiled its campaign for Spring Summer 2025. Focused on promoting bold self-expression and cultural connectivity, the project showcases the brand's commitment to innovation and creativity. The campaign aims to reach a wide audience and highlight the importance of individuality and inclusivity in fashion.

news.headline: Ingles Markets (IMKTA) reports results for Q1 of Fiscal 2025, ended on Dec 28, 2024. Chairman praises community support and hard-working staff.
news.summary: In Asheville, North Carolina, Ingles Markets, Incorporated (NASDAQ: IMKTA) released its financial results for the quarter ending on December 28, 2024. Chairman of the Board, Robert P. Ingle II, highlighted the company's commitment to offering value and a diverse selection of top-tier products to customers, particularly as recovery efforts continue in the supported communities. The company expressed gratitude towards its employees for their focus and hard work in enabling these efforts. The quarter's results were heavily influenced by the impact of Hurricane Helene.

news.headline: X4 Pharmaceuticals plans strategic restructuring to enhance Mavorixafor value. Phase 3 trial in chronic neutropenia to complete by mid-2025.
news.summary: The ongoing global Phase 3 clinical trial focusing on chronic neutropenia is set to achieve full enrollment by mid-2025. This pivotal trial involves a significant number of participants and aims to assess the effectiveness of a potential treatment for this condition. The trial's progress indicates a positive step towards advancing research and providing a possible solution for individuals suffering from chronic neutropenia.

Belden Inc. reported Q4 2024 revenues of $666 million, up 21% year-over-year, with EPS at $1.42, up 56%. Repurchased 0.5M shares worth $55M.
news.summary: Belden Inc., a global leader in connection solutions, announced its fiscal fourth quarter and full year results for the period ending December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter of 2024, the company saw revenues of $666 million, marking a 21% year-over-year increase and a 14% organic growth. Their GAAP EPS rose by 56% year-over-year to $1.42, while the adjusted EPS increased by 32% to $1.92. Additionally, Belden repurchased 0.5 million shares for $55 million during the quarter. For the full year 2024, Belden achieved revenues that...

news.headline: Latch, Inc., soon to be DOOR, appoints new leadership team for growth and execution. St. Louis based company.
news.summary: Latch, Inc., a company soon to be rebranded as DOOR, has recently appointed a new leadership team to lead its upcoming growth and execution strategies.

news.headline: Pagaya partners with Blue Owl Capital to buy $2.4B consumer loans over 24 months, fueling loan originations.
news.summary: Pagaya Technologies LTD., listed as PGY on NASDAQ, revealed a significant collaboration in New York today. The global tech firm unveiled a fresh forward flow deal with Blue Owl Capital, which involves acquiring a substantial amount of consumer loans. The agreement stipulates that Blue Owl's managed funds will purchase up to $2.4 billion worth of these loans via Pagaya's platform within a span of 24 months. This arrangement not only aids in financing loan originations but does so in a highly effective capital manner.

news.headline: Realbotix to announce Q1-2025 financial results on Feb 13, 2025. Investor webinar at 4:00 pm by CEO Andrew Kiguel.
news.summary: Realbotix Corp., a prominent developer of humanoid robots and companionship-based AI, has announced the release of its interim financial results for the three months ending December 31, 2024 ("Q1-2025"). The company, listed on TSX-V as XBOT, Frankfurt Stock Exchange as 76M0.F, and OTC as XBOTF, will unveil these results on February 13, 2025. CEO Andrew Kiguel will host an investor webinar on Zoom at 4:00 pm to discuss the financial performance.

news.headline: MasterCraft Boat Holdings, Inc. reported $63.4 million in net sales for Q2 2025, a decrease of 29.4%. Adjusted EBITDA dropped to $3.5 million from $12.9 million in the prior year. The company is expected to have net sales between $275 million and $295 million for full year fiscal 2025.
news.summary: MasterCraft Boat Holdings, Inc. reported financial results for its fiscal 2025 second quarter: net sales were $63.4 million, down 29.4% from the previous year. Income from continuing operations was $0.4 million, with Adjusted Net Income at $1.7 million and Adjusted EBITDA at $3.5 million. The company repaid all debt, with $62.9 million in cash and investments. The outlook for fiscal 2025 includes net sales between $275 million and $295 million, Adjusted EBITDA between $19 million and $24 million, and Adjusted Earnings per share between $0.64 and $0.86. The company's full-year guidance has been narrowed due to second quarter outperformance and positive feedback on the new XStar lineup. The conference call and webcast were held on February 6, 2025.

news.headline: Suburban Propane reported Q1 fiscal 2025 net income of $19.4M vs $24.5M in Q1 fiscal 2024. Adjusted EBITDA was $75.3M, flat YoY. Retail propane gallons sold decreased by 0.8% to 105.7M. Total gross margin increased by 6.3% to $226.2M. The acquisition cost $53.0M funded by $91.7M in net borrowings. The quarterly distribution is $0.325 per Common Unit, payable on Feb 11, 2025. For additional info, visit www.suburbanpropane.com.
news.summary: Suburban Propane Partners, L.P. reported earnings for the first quarter ended December 28, 2024. Net income was $19.4 million, a decrease from $24.5 million in the previous year. Adjusted EBITDA was $75.3 million, flat compared to the prior year. Propane volumes were slightly lower due to warm weather and reduced crop drying demand. Retail propane gallons sold decreased by 0.8% to 105.7 million gallons. Average propane prices increased by 14.9%. Total gross margin was $226.2 million, a 6.3% increase. Operating expenses increased to $150.0 million primarily due to higher payroll and benefit-related expenses. The Partnership recognized a $3.0 million income for contingent consideration from Equilibrium Capital Group. The Partnership acquired a propane business for $53.0 million and funded it with net borrowings of $91.7 million. Adjusted EBITDA excludes impairment charges for investments in Independence Hydrogen, Inc. and Oberon Fuels, Inc. The quarterly distribution per Common Unit was $0.325. Suburban Propane is a nationwide distributor of propane and renewable fuels servicing approximately 1 million customers across 42 states.

news.headline: BoE's Bailey: Behind the uptick in headline inflation stands a continued, gradual easing of underlying inflationary pressures
MSG Entertainment reported fiscal Q2 2025 results with $407.4 million revenues, 1.1 million tickets sold during Christmas Spectacular, and $25 million in Class A shares repurchased.
news.summary: MSG Entertainment reported record-setting revenues of $407.4 million in the fiscal second quarter ending December 31, 2024. Approximately 1.1 million tickets were sold during the Christmas Spectacular's 91st season, up from over a million in the previous season. The Company also repurchased $25 million of MSGE Class A shares during this quarter. Operating income reached $139.0 million, a 1% increase from the previous year, with adjusted operating income at $164.0 million. Direct operating expenses for entertainment offerings, arena license fees, and other leasing totaled $164.3 million, a 4% decrease. Food, beverage, and merchandise revenues were $59.3 million, with direct operating expenses at $32.8 million. Selling, general, and administrative expenses were $57.2 million, an 18% increase. The company also disclosed repurchasing 681,593 shares of MSGE Class A stock during this period. Since its spinoff in April 2023, MSG Entertainment has repurchased over five million shares for about $165 million, leaving $85 million under its existing authorization.

news.headline: AGCO reports net sales of $11.7B in 2024, down 19.1% from 2023. Full-year operating margin -1.0%, EPS $(5.69), and reaffirms 2025 outlook of $9.6B in net sales and EPS of $4.00-$4.50. Q4 net sales of $2.9B, down 24.0% compared to Q4 2023 with reported net loss at $(3.42) per share. EME regional sales down 16.7%, North America down 38.7%, full-year South America sales decreased 41.1%, and EME decreased 9.6%. North America sales decreased 24.7%, South America decreased 38.6%, EME decreased 10.9%, and APA decreased 24.0%. Reported full-year operating margin was -1.0% compared to 11.8% in 2023. The CEO remarked on company performance and market challenges, highlighting a focus on technology and cost control initiatives.
news.summary: AGCO, a global agriculture machinery and technology company, reported a net sales decrease of 19.1% in 2024 to $11.7 billion. The reported operating margin was (1.0)% with adjusted operating margin at 8.9%. Earnings per share were reported at $(5.69) for 2024, with adjusted EPS at $7.50. The company reaffirmed its 2025 outlook with projected net sales of approximately $9.6 billion and earnings per share of $4.00 - $4.50. The fourth quarter of 2024 saw a 24.0% decrease in net sales compared to the previous year. AGCO highlighted strong performance in 2024 amidst market challenges, including aggressive production cuts and reduction in inventory. The company plans to sustain its Farmer-First strategy in 2025, focusing on cost controls and investments in technology to navigate industry downturns and position itself for future success. AGCO noted declines in regional sales across the globe during 2024, with challenges and opportunities in different market segments. Tractor and combine sales also saw declines in key regions. The company remains wary of factors like geopolitical instability, fluctuating crop prices, and uncertainties in global markets impacting its operations. AGCO emphasized heightened cybersecurity measures and risks associated with supplier dependencies, international operations, and financial conditions. Key financials and balances sheets were also provided, outlining assets, liabilities, and stockholders' equity for the period.

news.headline: Bombardier beats Q4 estimated earnings by 48% with EPS of $3.01. Details on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: On Thursday, February 6, 2025, Bombardier (OTC:BDRBF) unveiled its Q4 earnings at 06:00 AM. The key highlight from the financial report was that Bombardier exceeded anticipated earnings by 48.0%, revealing an EPS of $3.01. For more details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

Garrett Motion scheduled conference call for Q4 2024 financial results on Feb 20, 2025.
news.summary: Garrett Motion has announced plans to conduct a conference call on Thursday, February 20, 2025, to discuss its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024. The call is scheduled to provide insights and detailed information regarding the company's performance during that period. Shareholders and interested parties are encouraged to participate in this event to gain a better understanding of Garrett Motion's financial standings for Q4 2024. Mark your calendars for this important call to stay informed about the company's recent financial outcomes.

news.headline: VR Resources updates Ontario projects: Silverback sees two complete holes, third underway, covering 700m strike at CZ target.
news.summary: Two boreholes have been finished, with a third currently in progress at Silverback, encompassing 700 meters of the CZ target area. The drilling aligns with the exploration model being used.

news.headline: ZenaTech testing high-density batteries for ZenaDrone 1000 to extend flight time for US defense; boosting reliability.
news.summary: ZenaTech, Inc., a tech company based in Vancouver, has revealed plans to begin testing a new high density battery designed for their ZenaDrone 1000 AI drone this quarter. The battery, supplied by ZenaTech's affiliate Galaxy Batteries Inc., aims to improve flight times, reliability, and endurance for defense and commercial applications. The high density batteries are lightweight, allowing for longer drone missions, heavier payloads, and increased operational success. ZenaDrone is a multifunctional AI drone tailored for various military uses, and this development is crucial for enhancing its capabilities. The company's stock is listed on Nasdaq (ZENA), Frankfurt Stock Exchange (49Q), and BMV (ZENA).

news.headline: Firm settles all unpaid cashless warrants from recent $X million capital raise.
news.summary: In the latest data released, it was reported that there has been a significant increase in the number of confirmed COVID-19 cases globally. The total number of cases worldwide has surpassed 200 million, with the death toll reaching over 4 million. This surge in cases has been attributed to the highly transmissible Delta variant, which continues to spread rapidly in many countries. Vaccination efforts are being ramped up in an attempt to curb the spread of the virus, with over 4 billion vaccine doses administered globally. However, health officials are warning that the situation remains dire and urge the public to adhere to safety guidelines to prevent further spikes in cases.

news.headline: FTI Consulting hires 2 senior managing directors, Matteo Dominianni & Alexey Timashkov, for their strategy consulting practice in FTI Delta. Characters: 131
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, FTI Consulting, Inc. revealed the recruitment of Matteo Dominianni and Alexey Timashkov as Senior Managing Directors for FTI Delta, the company’s strategy consulting branch in the Corporate Finance & Restructuring segment. Dominianni and Timashkov join as key figures in enhancing the services of FTI Consulting, Inc. (NYSE: FCN). This strategic move aims to strengthen the expertise within the firm, demonstrating a commitment to growth and innovation in the industry.

news.headline: BoE Gov. Bailey: We expect to be able to cut the bank rate further
